name: calling-bullshit-the-art-of-skepticism-in-a-data-driven-world
description: Carl Bergstrom and Jevin West's practical guide to critical thinking in the age of data — spotting statistical nonsense, misleading graphs, and misinformation that masquerades as science.
useCase: Develop the critical thinking skills to spot, analyze, and refute bullshit in scientific claims, news, advertising, and social media.
knownRisks: Some examples may be politically charged
Repeated emphasis on skepticism could lead to cynicism
Not a substitute for formal statistical training
